sourcesContent:
import { SITE_CONFIG } from '../../../utils/baseConfig';

export default {
  auth: {

    passwordPlaceholder: '请输入密码',
    requiresAuth: '需要登录',
    domainNotAuthorized: '域名未授权',

    back: '返回',
    loading: '加载中...',
    verificationCode: '验证码',
    sendCode: '发送验证码',
    verify: '验证',
    enterEmail: '请输入邮箱地址',
    enterVerificationCode: '请输入验证码',
    enterPassword: '请输入密码',
    selectEmailDomain: '选择邮箱域名',

    optional: '(选填)',
